name: Each L-1 catalog source declares all four required keys id source_class tier applies_to per the architecture table schema
command: node -e 'const y=require("fs").readFileSync(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT+"/pr-corpus/PR-SOURCES-DEFAULT.yaml","utf8");const blocks=y.split(/^  - id: /m).slice(1);for(const b of blocks){if(!/source_class:/.test(b)||!/tier:/.test(b)||!/applies_to:/.test(b))process.exit(1);}process.exit(0)' && echo ok 1>&2
